description: Show PRDs as primary entries on /blog with nested related stories inferred from post metadata, ordered newest-first.

userStories.title: Infer PRD-to-story mapping from post metadata
userStories.description: As a maintainer, I want PRD-to-story relationships inferred from post metadata so I don't have to maintain a separate mapping.
acceptanceCriteria: Define a deterministic mapping algorithm using post metadata in web/src/app/blog/posts.ts (e.g., tags like prd:<slug>)
Support associating multiple stories to a single PRD
Define behavior for stories without PRD tags (e.g., omit or group separately)
userStories.notes: Implemented tag-based mapping and normalization in posts data.

userStories.title: Render PRD groups with nested stories on /blog
userStories.description: As a reader, I want to see each PRD with its related stories nested underneath so I can quickly scan what shipped for each PRD.
acceptanceCriteria: Blog index renders PRD groups (PRD title/link) with nested story links below each
PRD groups are ordered newest-first by PRD date
Stories within each PRD group are ordered newest-first by story date
Layout remains responsive and consistent with the editorial list style
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill
userStories.notes: Grouped PRDs with nested stories on /blog.

userStories.title: Handle empty and unassigned edge cases
userStories.description: As a reader, I want clear behavior when PRDs have no linked stories or when posts lack PRD tags.
acceptanceCriteria: Define and implement UI behavior for PRDs with no related stories (e.g., show a note or omit)
Apply the defined behavior for stories without PRD tags
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill
userStories.notes: Added Unassigned group and empty-state note.
